creator: ncrogers@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 152188
Upgrade www/pound to 2.7

Pound 2.7 was just released as the next stable version. This is an important release as it includes: added "Disable PROTO" directives (fix for Poodle vulnerability). Many people in the pound community have been using the experimental 2.7 builds for some time.

http://www.apsis.ch/pound/pound_list/archive/2015/2015-01/1422291737000#1422291737000

Attached is a diff to bump www/pound from 2.6 to 2.7.
